# RetroUI (retro-retroui)

**Upstream:** https://github.com/Dksie09/RetroUI
**Demo:** ./src (Storybook source, no standalone demo.html)
**License:** BSD 3-Clause — see LICENSE

## What it looks like
Pixelated UI library for React/Next.js — similar territory to pxlkit but different visual direction.
Hard-edged flat colors, crisp borders, chunky typography. Less icon-focused, more component-focused.

## What it offers
- React/Next.js components with pixel-styled Tailwind classes
- Built with rollup (rollup.config.mjs) as distributable npm package
- Jest tests configured
- Bundled fonts in ./fonts
- Source components in ./src

## Clawmachine fit
LOW-MEDIUM. Overlaps neobrutalism-components and pxlkit without clear differentiation.
Keep as reference for component-API patterns; unlikely to be the lead source.
BSD license is compatible with MIT stack — no attribution-burden concern.
